gt_sql: SELECT t2.preferred_foot FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t1.birthday DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT pa.preferred_foot
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_fifa_api_id = pa.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE CAST(p.birthday AS INTEGER) = (SELECT MAX(CAST(birthday AS INTEGER)) FROM Player)
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the preferred foot when attacking of the youngest football player?
